CREATE TABLE dt32( `timestamp` Date32, `event_id` UInt8) ENGINE = TinyLog;
INSERT INTO dt32 VALUES ('1970-01-01', 1);
INSERT INTO dt32 VALUES ('2000-01-01', 2);
INSERT INTO dt32 VALUES ('2100-01-01', 3);
INSERT INTO dt32 VALUES (-1, 4);
INSERT INTO dt32 VALUES (0, 5);
INSERT INTO dt32 VALUES (47482, 6);
INSERT INTO dt32 VALUES (4102444800, 7);
SELECT * FROM dt32;
SELECT event_id FROM dt32 WHERE timestamp = '1970-01-01';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dt32 WHERE event_id < 5;
SELECT timestamp, COUNT(event_id) AS event_count FROM dt32 GROUP BY timestamp HAVING event_count > 1;
SELECT max(timestamp) FROM dt32 WHERE timestamp < '2000-01-01';
SELECT timestamp, event_id FROM dt32 WHERE timestamp IN (SELECT timestamp FROM dt32 WHERE event_id > 3);
CREATE TABLE dt32_copy AS dt32 ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
INSERT INTO dt32_copy SELECT * FROM dt32 WHERE event_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT dt32.timestamp, dt32.event_id FROM dt32 JOIN dt32_copy ON dt32.event_id = dt32_copy.event_id;
SELECT DISTINCT timestamp FROM dt32 HAVING timestamp < toDate32('2100-01-01');
SELECT event_id, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM dt32 GROUP BY event_id ORDER BY event_count DESC;
INSERT INTO dt32 SELECT addDays(timestamp, 5), event_id FROM dt32 WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT timestamp, AVG(event_id) FROM dt32 GROUP BY timestamp HAVING timestamp > toDate32('2000-01-01') ORDER BY timestamp DESC;
